case_title: DESOTO CAB COMPANY VS. CHER LAI SIVILAY

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,913.58 FILED BY DESOTO CAB COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SIVILAY, CHER LAI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
